channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Coachella 2026 Livestream to Features All Seven Stages, 4K Resolution
item.description: Dancing into the future with Coachella 2026! 🌟🎶 Get ready for an epic livestream experience like never before! ✨ #Coachella2026 #LivestreamMadness

item.title: Weatherday announce fall North American tour
item.description: 🎶 Pack your bags, Weatherday is hitting the road! 🚌 Catch them on their North American tour this fall! 🌟 #WeatherdayTour

item.title: GoldFish Take a Big Dive into the Space Between Jazz and Dance Music
item.description: Diving deep with GoldFish into the groovy galaxy where jazz meets dance! 🎷🌌💃 #MusicMagic

item.title: Björk Will Spend the Eclipse Raving in Iceland
item.description: 🌞🌑 Björk is bringing the beats to the eclipse! Get ready to rave under the Icelandic sky! 🎶 #MusicNews #Bjork #EclipseParty

item.title: Denzel Curry Celebrates Being “First Rapper Played In Space”
item.description: 🚀 Denzel Curry's outta this world! 🌌 Who knew his bars could reach space? 🎤 #NextLevelRap
